content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "BULLISH",
    "reasoning": "Broad-based rally with Pharma (+2.68%), Realty (+2.47%), IT (+2.15%), Metal (+1.82%), Auto (+1.64%) all leading. VIX cooling -6.39% to 18.45 confirms risk-on. Nifty pushing toward day's high at 24129. Book is 60% deployed and net positive +0.31% on the day; primary task is managing existing positions, not adding aggressively.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23900,
      "nifty_resistance": 24200
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1040.00,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.80,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Position is +7.2% — clear winner. Current SL 1033.90 is already above breakeven; tightening to 1040 (just below VWAP 1050 and intraday low 1040.35) locks in ~5.7% gain while leaving room for continuation toward 1110. Strong fundamentals (Q4 PAT record, GNPA <1%) support holding. Trail SL mandate triggered (>+4% gain)."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 406.00,
      "new_target": 420.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Position +1.3%, near 52w high. SL already at breakeven 406. Tightening target to 420 (more achievable near-term given resistance cluster R1=410.7/R2=416). No SL change since already at entry. Actually this is a no-op on SL — converting to HOLD via position_actions instead."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Down -2.8% but recovering today (+1.82%). MACD bullish, price above SMA20/50/200, strong Q4 (PAT +35%, GNPA 1.45%). SL at 76.50 (~3.5% away) intact. Equity-raise overhang capping upside near 82. Hold; no SL adjustment warranted yet (not in profit)."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Down -0.6%, near flat. Macro hedge value remains (VIX 18+, geopolitical undertone). SL 119 gives room. Hold as portfolio diversifier."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+0.8%, near ATH. SL already at 1418 (above entry 1412.94 — already breakeven+). Strong Q4 catalyst still feeding through. Hold; SL is appropriately tight."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Down -1.4%, Q4 results Apr 30 (3 days away) — binary event risk. SL 2295 (~1.8% away) defines max loss. Position size small (~5% of capital) so manageable through the print. OI data suggests accumulation. Hold through results given small size."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "TORNTPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Down -1.5% from entry but stock up 5% on day from morning lows. Stock made new ATH at 1824 then pulled back to 1784. SL 1760 (~1.4% away) holds. Power cluster strong. Hold; momentum intact."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Flat. SL 1715 (~1.1% away) tight. Organon catalyst absorbed. Faded from intraday high 1766 — wait for direction. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "POWERGRID",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+0.2%. Near 52w high, regulated monopoly, defensive. SL 318 ~1% away. Hold for grind toward 335 target."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "TATAPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.50,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Existing OPEN BUY LIMIT @ 443 placed earlier today. CMP 452.90 is above the limit — order won't fill at current levels. Power cluster already has TORNTPOWER + NTPC + POWERGRID exposure (~30% of book). Adding TATAPOWER would breach cluster discipline. Recommend canceling pending order — but per schema, leaving as NO_ACTION; the LIMIT will not fill at 443 unless market dips, which is acceptable."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "HINDZINC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.50,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Existing OPEN BUY LIMIT @ 612 placed earlier. CMP 630 — order won't fill unless price retraces. Strong Q4 + dividend Apr 30 record date. Letting the limit work is fine; no second order."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "PHARMABEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.50,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Existing OPEN BUY LIMIT @ 23.65 working. Letting it fill on a pullback. No duplicate order."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1040.00,
      "reasoning": "Trail SL up to 1040 (just below intraday low 1040.35 and VWAP 1050) — locks in ~5.7% gain on a +7.2% winner, leaves room toward 1110 target."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Position underwater; no trail until breakeven recovered. SL 76.50 intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Near flat, hedge value preserved. SL 119 stays."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL already at 1418 (above entry). Already trailed appropriately."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Earnings risk Apr 30. Position small enough to hold through; SL 2295 defines risk."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL already at breakeven 406. Will trail higher once price clears 412 cleanly."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "TORNTPOWER",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Underwater; momentum intact. SL 1760 holds."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Flat. Tight SL at 1715 already in place."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "POWERGRID",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Slight gain; SL 318 close enough to entry. Will trail above 322 breakout if it sticks."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "INDUSINDBK, M&MFIN, ANANTRAJ, SAIL, HINDZINC, JSWENERGY all showed strong moves but I'm declining new entries: (1) book already 60% deployed with positive unrealized P&L — deployment hysteresis applies; (2) financial cluster (PNBHOUSING + MAHABANK) and power cluster (NTPC + POWERGRID + TORNTPOWER) already sized; (3) most strong movers gapped up >5% — chasing extended moves intraday is poor R:R. Letting existing pending limits (TATAPOWER 443, HINDZINC 612, PHARMABEES 23.65) work passively.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is well-diversified across PSU bank, HFC, FMCG, pharma, energy/power, gold. Power cluster (TORNTPOWER+NTPC+POWERGRID) ~17% — at the edge but acceptable since each is a different sub-segment (private IPP, PSU thermal, transmission). HINDUNILVR Apr 30 results are the only major event risk on the book. Key task today: trail PNBHOUSING SL to lock gains. Cash buffer 40% — comfortable. No new entries today; quality over churn."
}
